## Description
Brief description of changes in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security fix

## Clinical Impact
- [ ] Affects medical code accuracy or mapping
- [ ] Affects patient data integrity
- [ ] Affects clinical data processing performance
- [ ] No clinical impact (infrastructure/docs only)

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Performance tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Security tests (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (`cargo fmt`)
- [ ] My code passes clippy checks (`cargo clippy`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md following the project's format

## Documentation
- [ ] README.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API documentation updated (doc comments)
- [ ] Examples updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md updated (if adding new development patterns)

## Breaking Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] This PR introduces breaking changes
- [ ] Migration guide provided
- [ ] Deprecated functionality documented
- [ ] Version bump required

## Security Considerations
- [ ] This change involves sensitive clinical data
- [ ] This change affects data integrity or validation
- [ ] This change introduces new dependencies (security vetted)
- [ ] Privacy impact assessment completed

## Performance Impact
- [ ] This change improves performance
- [ ] This change degrades performance
- [ ] Benchmark results included
- [ ] Memory usage impact assessed

## Clinical Domain Validation
- [ ] Medical codes validated against official standards
- [ ] Clinical logic reviewed by domain expert
- [ ] Data formats validated with real clinical datasets
- [ ] Regulatory compliance checked

## Additional Context
Any additional context, screenshots, or details about the pull request.

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)
